apihelp-cirrus-config-dump-param-prop: Nooca doorsoomayaasha qaabeynta ee la soo tuurayo
apihelp-cirrus-mapping-dump-summary: Tuurista khariidaynta Raadinta Cirrus ee wiki-kan.
apihelp-cirrus-mapping-dump-example: Hel tuurista khariidaynta Raadinta Cirrus ee wiki-kan.
apihelp-cirrus-settings-dump-summary: Tuurista dejimaha Raadinta Cirrus ee wiki-kan.
apihelp-cirrus-settings-dump-example: Hel tuurista dejimaha Raadinta Cirrus ee wiki-kan.
apihelp-cirrus-profiles-dump-summary: Tuurista profiles-ka Raadinta Cirrus ee wiki-kan.
apihelp-cirrus-profiles-dump-example: Hel tuurista profiles-ka Raadinta Cirrus ee wiki-kan.
apihelp-query+cirrusdoc-summary: Tuurista dukumeentiga maqaalka Raadinta Cirrus ee adeega raadinta.
apihelp-query+cirrusdoc-example: Hel tuurista hal maqaal oo Raadinta Cirrus ah sida uu hadda ugu kaydsan yahay raadinta.
apihelp-query+cirrusdoc-example-2: Hel tuurista dejimaha Raadinta Cirrus ee wiki-kan, iyadoo la soo saarayo kaliya qaybaha lagu xushay cabbirka 'includes'.
apihelp-query+cirrusdoc-param-includes: Qeex meelaha la rabo in lagu soo celiyo natiijada raadinta.
apihelp-query+cirrusbuilddoc-summary: Tuurista dukumeentiga maqaalka Raadinta Cirrus ee laga soo qaado serverrada keydka xogta.
apihelp-query+cirrusbuilddoc-example: Hel tuurista hal maqaal oo Raadinta Cirrus ah oo laga soo sameeyay keydka xogta.
apihelp-query+cirrusbuilddoc-param-limit: Profile-ka la adeegsanayo marka la xaddidayo cabbirka dukumeentiga.
apierror-cirrus-requesttoolong: Codsiga raadinta hordhaca wuxuu ka dheeraaday dhererka ugu badan ee la oggol yahay. ($1 > $2)
apihelp-query+cirruscompsuggestbuilddoc-: Tuurista dukumeentiga uu adeegsado soo jeediyeha dhamaystirka.
Hel tuurista dukumeentiga uu adeegsado soo-jeediyeha dhamaystirka
Bixi magaca habka qiimeynta ee uu adeegsanayo soo jeediyeha dhamaystirka
apihelp-cirrus-check-sanity-summary: Warbixin ku saabsan saxnaanta tiro aqoonsi bogag ah oo ku jira tusmada raadinta
apihelp-cirrus-check-sanity-param-cluste: Kooxda raadinta ee lagu hubinayo tusmooyinka
apihelp-cirrus-check-sanity-param-limit: Tirada aqoonsiyada bogagga ee la hubinayo
apihelp-cirrus-check-sanity-param-sequen: Tirada jeer ee kooxdan aqoonsiyada bogagga la hubiyay.
apihelp-cirrus-check-sanity-param-rerend: Tirada jeer ee hubin ka dib bogga ay tahay in dib loo sameeyo. Waxay ku salaysan tahay aqoonsiga taxanaha la bixiyay.
apiwarn-cirrus-ignore-revisions: Wax ka badan hal dib-u eegis ayaa loo bixiyay bogga. Kaliya dib u eegista ugu dambeysa ayaa la soo celin doonaa.
